title: The Power of Amen: What You're Really Saying
title_zh: 阿们的力量：你真正在说什么
title_he: כוח האמן: מה אתה באמת אומר
description: The etymology, laws, and spiritual weight of responding 'Amen' — why it's considered even greater than making the blessing itself.
author: Torah Light Editorial Team
chinese_cultural_parallels: 正名 (zhèngmíng) - Confucian rectification of names
真言 (zhēnyán) - Daoist mantras and true words
Verbal affirmation in Chinese toasts and blessings
learning_objectives: Understand the etymology and meaning of 'Amen'
Learn the precise halachic rules for answering Amen
Discover the mystical significance of Amen as a name of God
Appreciate why the Talmud considers answering Amen greater than reciting the blessing
Develop a mindful practice of responding with intention
Connect Jewish concepts of verbal affirmation to Chinese philosophical traditions
